title: Hider Creative Items
description: ✘ Hides items from the creative menu
body:
# EN 
## ATTENTION, this mod is no longer relevant, its functionality in a better form is available in the [UNIVERSAL BLOCKING mod!](https://modrinth.com/mod/universal-blocking)
# RU
## ВНИМАНИЕ, данный мод уже не актуален, его функционал в лучшей форме доступен в модe [UNIVERSAL BLOCKING!](https://modrinth.com/mod/universal-blocking)
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

_The mod is made to order_
## Hides items from the creative menu:
minecraft\saves\YourWorld\serverconfig\hidercreativeitems-server.toml

```
#Items to hide from creative menu (e.g., minecraft:tnt)
items_to_hide = [""]
#Tags to hide from creative menu (e.g., minecraft:axes)
tags_to_hide = [""]
#Items whose tags will be hidden (e.g., minecraft:oak_planks -> minecraft:planks)
items_with_tags_to_hide = [""]

```

**We can arrange to order a mod at Discord, my nickname is Gvoper**

</details>
